title: poa divaricata var. brevifolia
intro: Poa divaricata var. brevifolia, also known as mountain grass, is a type of grass species native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially treating conditions such as arthritis and eczema. Poa divaricata var. brevifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
